Dear Dr. Tan Wei Ming,

We are pleased to offer you the position of Senior Research Scientist at Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd. (UEN: T12LL3456K). Your annual salary will be SGD 120,000, payable monthly. You will report directly to Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, the Head of Research Department.

Your employment will commence on 1 November 2023, and you will be based at our Singapore office located at 123 Fusion Road, #05-01, Singapore 098765. Please review the attached terms and conditions of employment, and confirm your acceptance by signing below.

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our HR Manager, Mr. Ramasamy Muthu, at +65 9876 5432 or hr@quantumsg.sg.

Sincerely,

Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
Head of Research Department  
Quantum Innovations Pte. Ltd.  

[Signature Line for Acceptance]
